title: Calendar Share Web-Link not allowing monthly toggle
excerpt: When we share a board’s calendar view as a web link, only the current month appears and does not allow anyone to select other months to view the full calendar. Anyone else experiencing this??

posts.author: Aschne43 (Anne Schneider)
posts.cookedHtml: When we share a board’s calendar view as a web link, only the current month appears and does not allow anyone to select other months to view the full calendar. Anyone else experiencing this??

posts.author: Typhoon77 (Melissa White)
posts.cookedHtml: I was struggling with this too. I discovered you have to undock the calendar widget and make the sharable link from that. If the widget is docked then all the navigation/monthly toggle will not show. Once you make the sharable link then it you can change it back to however you prefer it to be in Monday. I think how it sees it is, if it’s docked, the navigation is controlled in Monday, when it’s undocked that navigation goes back to the widget. I hope this helps!

posts.author: DanielGrove (Daniel Grove)
posts.cookedHtml: Wow thank you for that solution! What a strange design choice, I would have never found that!
